recovery.title: Important
recovery.body: No recovery code configured. Without it, forgetting your password = losing all your data.

totp.title: Suggestion
totp.body: Enable 2FA (TOTP) to add a layer to your login.

modules.title: Tip
modules.body: All modules are enabled by default.

journalStrip.heading: Last 30 days
journalStrip.ariaLabel: Writing density over the last 30 days

actions.title: Quick actions
actions.description: Jump straight to the modules you use the most.

available.title: Available modules
available.description: Enable new spaces to enrich your guidance.
